arts.ttl: Gasperini: “Shakhtar Donetsk may not be Arsenal, but they’re still a valuable team”
arts.sum: Atalanta manager Gian Piero Gasperini spoke to the media ahead of his team’s UEFA Champions League match against Shakhtar Donetsk. The Italian coach expressed confidence in his squad’s form following the international break, despite a recent loss to Como. “We’ve started well after the transfer window closed,” Gasperini stated. “We had that defeat against Como, but the team put in a good performance in Bologna. arts.ttl: Champions League | Shakhtar Donetsk v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Veltins-Arena in Gelsenkirchen, Germany, is set to host an intriguing Champions League encounter on Wednesday as Shakhtar Donetsk face Atalanta. Both teams are looking to secure their first win in the group stage after drawing their opening matches. Shakhtar Donetsk, making their eighth consecutive appearance in the Champions League proper, began their campaign with a goalless draw against Bologna. The Ukrainian champions have struggled in recent years, failing to progress past the group stage for six seasons running. Under new coach Marino Pusic, Shakhtar completed a domestic double last season but have yet to find consistent form this term. arts.ttl: Shakhtar Donetsk vs Atalanta predictions: Look for La Dea to triumph in Gelsenkirchen
arts.sum: Shakhtar Donetsk and Atalanta both had to settle for goalless draws in their opening Champions League games but Joe Casey is expecting more goalmouth action on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Ruggeri sidelined with knee Issue, set to miss Champions League match
arts.sum: Atalanta’s injury woes continue as manager Gian Piero Gasperini faces another setback in his squad. Following the long-term absence of Marco Brescianini, the team will now be without one of its most reliable players, left-back Matteo Ruggeri, for the upcoming Champions League fixture. Calciomercato report how the 21-year-old Italian defender, who has already made seven appearances and provided one assist this season across the European Super Cup, Champions League, and Serie A, is suffering from gonalgia in his left knee. This condition has been affecting him for some time and has now forced him to take a break from play. The post Atalanta’s Ruggeri sidelined with knee Issue, set to miss Champions League match appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta suffer blow as Brescianini sidelined with Injury
arts.sum: Atalanta have been dealt a significant setback with the news that midfielder Marco Brescianini will be out of action for over a month due to injury. The 24-year-old, who joined Gian Piero Gasperini’s side from Frosinone this summer, was forced to leave the field during the first half of the 1-1 draw against Bologna. Calciomercato report how Brescianini sustained a muscular problem in his left thigh flexors around the 38th minute of the match. The incident occurred when he attempted to control a pass from Kolasinac and stretch to shoot towards Skorupski’s goal.
